title: Profile data and diff against a baseline
description: Profile a dataset and compare distributions, null rates, and counts to a baseline, reporting drift and anomalies with magnitudes.
body: Use when investigating a suspected quality or drift issue. Actions: profile the current dataset (types, null rates, ranges, cardinality, row counts) and diff it against a stored baseline, reporting each metric's shift with magnitude and whether it exceeds tolerance. Distinguish likely pipeline bugs (count drops, new nulls) from genuine distribution shifts. Do not report a shift as drift without ruling out a load defect. This skill exposes capability only and does not modify data. Validation signals include a per-feature diff against the baseline. Risk boundary: a count or null-rate cliff usually signals a pipeline bug, not drift; flag it for source investigation before any retraining.
